WITH query_482 AS (
select count(sub_query.count) as repeat_guest
FROM
(
SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
)sub_query
),
query_3 AS (
SELECT DATE(enquired_at), COUNT(enquired_at)
FROM rental_opportunities
WHERE DATE(enquired_at) >= DATE(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '7 days')
GROUP BY DATE(enquired_at)
order by date(enquired_at) asc
),
query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug
                      ORDER BY activities.resolved_at) AS ranking,
          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')
     and date(enquired_at) > date(now() - interval '300 days')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc
),
query_2 AS (
SELECT NULL
),
query_491 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.secondary_to_primary) as int) as secondary_to_primary
from
(
select case when query_1.created_at < query_2.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as secondary_to_primary
from
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_1
inner join 
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.created_at,query_2.resolved_at
)query_3
),
query_490 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.primary_to_secondary) as int) as primary_to_secondary
from(
select case when query_2.created_at > query_1.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as primary_to_secondary
from
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as query_1
inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.resolved_at,query_2.created_at
)query_3
),
query_498 AS (
select count(sub_query.count) as repeat_guest
from
(
select mobiles.mobile,count(mobiles.mobile) as count
from rental_opportunities inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
and mobiles.mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobiles.mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobiles.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY mobiles.mobile
)sub_query
)
select (a.repeat_guest+b.secondary_to_primary+c.primary_to_secondary+d.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest
from query_482 as a
join query_491 as b
join query_490 as c
join query_498 as d

WITH query_484 AS (
select avg(sub_query.gmv) as ltv
from(
SELECT x.mobile,count(x.mobile),sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as gmv
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
    
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and x.mobile != '' 
GROUP BY x.mobile
HAVING   COUNT(x.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY x.mobile
)sub_query
),
query_535 AS (
select cast(sum(sub_query.gmv) as int) as gmv
from
(SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as edate,sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as gmv
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
group by resolved_at_date_ist
) sub_query
),
query_536 AS (
select cast(sum(sub_query.count) as int) as bookings
from
(
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as eDate,count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (date_part('year',performed_at)=2021 or date_part('year',performed_at)=2020)
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
group by resolved_at_date_ist
)sub_query
),
query_537 AS (
select (query.gmv/query.bookings) as aov from
(
select * from query_535 as a
join query_536 as b
) query
)
select * from query_484 as a
join query_537 as b

query_551 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),

FROM

from

                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x

) as a

(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id

   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x

and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile

ORDER BY count desc

)query1

 ) x

query_560 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now() + interval '330 minutes')-1
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now() + interval '330 minutes')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff>=10)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),

 ) x

),
query_562 AS (
select (cast(12 as int)) as month,* from query_547
union 
select (cast(11 as int)) as month,* from query_560
union
select (cast(10 as int)) as month,* from query_561
)
select case when query_1.month=1 then 'January'
        when query_1.month=2 then 'February'
        when query_1.month=3 then 'March'
        when query_1.month=4 then 'April'
        when query_1.month=5 then 'May'
        when query_1.month=6 then 'June'
        when query_1.month=7 then 'July'
        when query_1.month=8 then 'August'
        when query_1.month=9 then 'September'
        when query_1.month=10 then 'October' 
        when query_1.month=11 then 'November'
        when query_1.month=12 then 'December'
        end as month, query_1.percentage
from
(
select sub_query.month,(sub_query.repeat_guest*100/sub_query.bookings) as percentage
from
(
select a.month,a.bookings,b.repeat_guest from query_555 as a
join query_562 as b on a.month=b.month
)sub_query
)query_1
order by query_1.month asc
